title: Light Chicken Curry
description: A refreshing and flavorful Portuguese-inspired chicken curry, made with tender chicken and a hint of spice. Perfect for a light and satisfying meal.
instructions: 1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Stir in the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
6. Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
7. Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the curry sauce.
9. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
